C:\qtqt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\666_zhuanzong.dir/objects.a
C:\qtqt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\666_zhuanzong.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\666_zhuanzong.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\qtqt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\666_zhuanzong.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o 666_zhuanzong.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib666_zhuanzong.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\666_zhuanzong.dir\linkLibs.rsp
